mapper.sql: /* wms-inbound-iborder-sql-oracle.xml - selectIbDtCfsql - 입고 지시 확정 상세 조회 SQL */ SELECT '0' AS CHK , A.CTKEY , A.OWKEY , A.IBHDKEY , A.IBDTKEY , A.IBCFSEQNO , A.ICKEY , C.ICNM , CTG3.CTGNM AS LV1_CTGNM , CTG2.CTGNM AS LV2_CTGNM , CTG1.CTGNM AS LV3_CTGNM , A.IBCNFRMDATE , A.EXPDATE , COALESCE(B.EXPCTQTY, 0) AS EXPCTQTY , CASE WHEN I.ICUNITQTY IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN B.EXPCTQTY > 0 THEN ROUND(B.EXPCTQTY / COALESCE(I.ICUNITQTY, 1), 2) ELSE COALESCE(B.EXPCTQTY, 0) END AS EXPCTQTY_INN , CASE WHEN J.ICUNITQTY IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN B.EXPCTQTY > 0 THEN ROUND(B.EXPCTQTY / COALESCE(J.ICUNITQTY, 1), 2) ELSE COALESCE(B.EXPCTQTY, 0) END AS EXPCTQTY_CTN , CASE WHEN J.ICUNITQTY IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN B.EXPCTQTY > 0 THEN ROUND(B.EXPCTQTY / (COALESCE(J.ICUNITQTY, 1) * CASE COALESCE(J.CPPQTY, 0) WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE J.CPPQTY END), 2) ELSE COALESCE(B.EXPCTQTY, 0) END AS EXPCTQTY_PLT , COALESCE(B.EXPCTQTY * C.SLPRC, 0) AS EXPCTQTY_SLPRC , COALESCE(A.IBQTY, 0) AS IBQTY , CASE WHEN I.ICUNITQTY IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN A.IBQTY > 0 THEN ROUND(A.IBQTY / COALESCE(I.ICUNITQTY, 1), 2) ELSE COALESCE(A.IBQTY, 0) END AS IBQTY_INN , CASE WHEN J.ICUNITQTY IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN A.IBQTY > 0 THEN ROUND(A.IBQTY / COALESCE(J.ICUNITQTY, 1), 2) ELSE COALESCE(A.IBQTY, 0) END AS IBQTY_CTN , CASE WHEN J.ICUNITQTY IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN A.IBQTY > 0 THEN ROUND(A.IBQTY / (COALESCE(J.ICUNITQTY, 1) * CASE COALESCE(J.CPPQTY, 0) WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE J.CPPQTY END), 2) ELSE COALESCE(A.IBQTY, 0) END AS IBQTY_PLT , COALESCE(A.IBQTY * C.SLPRC, 0) AS IBQTY_SLPRC , A.WEIGHT , B.IBDTSTATUSCD , B.ASRTWKQTY , B.PLCMSTATUSCD , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TWORK_INFO_IBCF_CNTR WHERE CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND IBHDKEY = A.IBHDKEY AND IBDTKEY = A.IBDTKEY AND IBCFSEQNO = A.IBCFSEQNO AND BFCHGCNTRNO = A.CNTRNO AND CNTRNO != BFCHGCNTRNO ) AS TRANS_CNTR_COUNT , A.CNTRNO , A.INSERTDATE , A.INSERTURKEY , A.UPDATEDATE , A.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_IBCF_DT A INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IB_DT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.IBHDKEY = B.IBHDKEY AND A.IBDTKEY = B.IBDTKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC C ON A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = C.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTG CTG1 ON A.CTKEY = CTG1.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = CTG1.OWKEY AND C.CTGKEY = CTG1.CTGKEY AND CTG1.CTGLV = '3' INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTG CTG2 ON CTG1.CTKEY = CTG2.CTKEY AND CTG1.OWKEY = CTG2.OWKEY AND CTG1.UPRCTGKEY = CTG2.CTGKEY AND CTG2.CTGLV = '2' INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTG CTG3 ON CTG2.CTKEY = CTG3.CTKEY AND CTG2.OWKEY = CTG3.OWKEY AND CTG2.UPRCTGKEY = CTG3.CTGKEY AND CTG3.CTGLV = '1' LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE I ON A.CTKEY = I.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = I.OWKEY AND C.ICUNITKEY = I.ICUNITKEY AND I.ICUNITTYPECD = 'INN' LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE J ON A.CTKEY = J.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = J.OWKEY AND C.ICUNITKEY = J.ICUNITKEY AND J.ICUNITTYPECD = 'CTN' WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.IBHDKEY = #{ibhdkey} AND A.IBDTKEY = #{ibdtkey}

/* wms-inbound-iborder-sql-oracle.xml - selectIbStocksql - 입고 지시 재고정보 조회 SQL */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT B.ICKEY , B.ICNM , B.ICTMPRDIVCD , #{uom} AS UOM , CASE WHEN D.AVQTY > 0 THEN ROUND(D.AVQTY / (COALESCE(D.ICUNITQTY, 1) * CASE COALESCE(D.CPPQTY, 0) WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE D.CPPQTY END),2) ELSE D.AVQTY END AS AVQTY_UNIT , D.AVQTY , A.IBCNFRMDATE , A.PRDCTDATE , A.EXPDATE , A.WEIGHT , C.IVATKEY , A.INSERTDATE , A.INSERTURKEY , A.UPDATEDATE , A.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_IBCF_DT A INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT C ON A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = C.ICKEY AND A.IVATKEY = C.IVATKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVATXLC D ON A.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = D.ICKEY AND A.IVATKEY = D.IVATKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE E ON A.CTKEY = E.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = E.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = E.ICKEY AND #{uom} = E.ICUNITTYPECD WHERE 1=1 AND A.IBHDKEY = #{ibhdkey} AND A.IBDTKEY = #{ibdtkey} AND A.IBCFSEQNO = #{ibcfseqno} )
mapper.select:
/* wms-inbound-iborder-sql-oracle.xml - selectIbDt - 입고 지시 상세 조회 */
ORDER BY #{colName} DESC
ORDER BY #{colName} ASC
ORDER BY CAST(IBDTKEY AS NUMERIC)

/* wms-inbound-iborder-sql-oracle.xml - selectIbDtCf - 입고 지시 확정 상세 조회 */
ORDER BY #{colName} DESC
ORDER BY #{colName} ASC
ORDER BY CAST(IBCFSEQNO AS NUMERIC)
